title: InfoStoreEntry
description: Represents an object in the BI Platform CMS InfoStore repository. All managed objects including documents, folders, users, and groups are represented as InfoStore entries.

SI_NAME.description: The display name of the object

SI_KIND.description: The object type (e.g., Webi, CrystalReport, Folder, FullClient, Publication)

SI_DESCRIPTION.description: A text description of the object

SI_CREATION_TIME.description: The timestamp when the object was created

SI_UPDATE_TS.description: The timestamp when the object was last updated

SI_PARENTID.description: The CMS ID of the parent folder

SI_PATH.description: The full path to the object in the repository
